titleStmt.title: SII 17.170: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 170. (A.R. No. 150 of 1904.) TIRUKAṆṬHĒŚVARAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Naṭanapādēśvara temple.

This inscription is dated in the reign of Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ, who from the reference to Kōyilpoṉmēyndaperumāḷ and Sundarapāṇḍya in the body of the inscription, may be identical with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya I. This is dated in the 205th day of the 14th Year.

It records a royal order leasing out 30 vēli of land belonging to Deyvanāyakaṉ temple in Tiruvayindirapuram in Marudāḍu, a hamlet of Śōḻakulavallinallūr and Kīḻaikkēraḷāntakanallūr as kuḍinīṅgāda tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam to the chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas of Puttuḻāṉ-Brahmadēśam in Tiruvayīndiram by Puttuḻār Tiruvaraṅgachchelvar alias Villavarāyar. The bhaṭṭas were required to measure out annually to the Deyvanāyakan temple, 20 kalam of paddy per vēli, as āyam, upādi and kaḍamai for food and other offerings to the image of god Kōyil-poṉmēynda Perumāḷ, set up by the king in his name and for offerings on the occasion of Sundarapāṇḍyaṉ sandhi for the god Deyvanāyakaṉ. Tachchaneṉmali-uḍaiyāṉ figures as the signatory of the record. The body called Iraṇḍāyiravar was entrusted with the supervision of this arrangement.

This record pertaining to the Deyvanāyakaṉ temple of Tiruvayīndiram (Tiruvēndipuram) was engraved here evidently because some of the lands under reference were situated in Śōḻakulavallinallūr, where Tirukkaṇṭhēśvaram was situated.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tiruvayintirapurattu puttuḻāṉ pirama tecattu catuṟvetippaṭṭarkaḷukku puttuḻār
tiruvaraṅkac celvarāṉa villavarāyar taṅkaḷ Akarattukku kāṇiyāka coḻakulavalli nallūrp piṭākai marutāṭṭilum kīḻaikkeraḷānta
kanallūr Uḷḷiṭṭa kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum koṇṭuviṭṭa patiṉ mūṉṟāvatu varaiyum Aṭaippu niṅkalāṉa nilam Irupattu Aṟuveliyum puṉcey nilam patiṟṟu veliyum nāya
ṉār teyvanāyakaṉ tiruttuvātecippaṭi Eḻuntaruḷa Ivar kāṇiyāka koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam veliyum Ikkoyil ciṅkapperumāḷ tiruuṭaiyāṭṭam nilam veliyum
Innāyaṉārkku villavarāyar ceyvitta Ulakamuṇṭāṉ tirunantavaṉañ ceyyum perkku Ivar kāṇiyākak koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Iruveliyum Āka nilam muppatiṟṟuThere is a mistake in the details given here.veliyum patiṉ muṉṟāvatu
varaiyum Aṭaippu niṅkalāṉa nilattu patiṉālāvatu mutal payircceytu koḷḷavum Innilattu kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvum kaṭaippūvum vampum puṉpayirum karumpum Ilaikkoṭi
yum kamukum Uḷḷiṭṭa tāṉveṇṭum payirc ceytu koṇṭu Ettamum Iṭāvum Iṟaittup payirc ceyta nilam Uṭpaṭa payircceyta nilattukku Āṇṭoṉṟukku Aṉaittāyaṅka
ḷum Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa veliyoṉṟukku Irupatiṉ kalamāka vanta nellum puṉcey nilattukku nāṭṭu mariyātippaṭi kaṭamaiyāl vanta mutalum Ikkoyilil namperāl Uka
ntaruḷuvitta koyil poṉmeynta perumāḷukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavukkum nāyaṉār teyva nāyakaṉukku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ
cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavukkum Uṭalāka Ikkoyil paṇṭārattile celavāk kavum Ippaṭikku Innilam kuṭinīṅkāta tiru Uṭaiyāṭṭamākavum
coṉṉom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟc celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai taccaneṉmali Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu nāḷ
2 100 5 tulyam Inta dharmmam Iraṇṭāyiravar rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 17.170 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
